{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164036D9548A0F9D3EEE2CDEB2"}"},"total":1662},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570875506007884569","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常难得的仿原著西游记文笔的小说。借用了大量西游记原著诗句更是作者自己自创了许多诗句，文笔方面绝对不低。更是有修行之妙道，是为西游记扩写的绝唱。该功底在番茄里面也算是最好的那一席位了！","text_exts":[{"e":11,"s":8,"text":"西游记","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774255236EE2CDEB2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227570875506007884569%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227548681439861017662%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A5%BF%E6%B8%B8%E8%AE%B0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762774973,"group_id":"7548681439861017662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好奇写作，提升文笔。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3NuAQ8RQtnVECs/jFDaWprtjBS4GjvwL5uOziduGX7D","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7c3092a8d1614d6590e3468e3736fe65~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790485&x-signature=PV14pGUB0VsTB3Ep4zcZ2pry%2B0M%3D","user_id":"4230525998859965","user_name":"混元大帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4230525998859965","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548681439861017662","book_info":{"abstract":"【纯西游】+【修道】+【长生】+【金丹】+【传统仙侠】
大道得从心死后，此身误在我生前。
韩庆穿越到了春秋之时，成为晋国韩氏子弟，阴差阳错成为函谷关司关，与尹喜为友，亲眼目睹老子西出函谷关，选择拜老子为师，求个长生道。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8b3c3ce16a6d71cf75d77a61ca8127d2","author":"乙巳乙酉癸未","author_id":"","book_id":"7548681439861017662","book_name":"西游金丹修行笔记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7548681445594645054","read_count":"73236","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"299604"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"147","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/98d34ca14296eb16b1806d8ce0cb8e69~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779439236&x-signature=gHeN%2BLgziOMKmbJk8aBMD4ASsto%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2287425165462765","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323164036D9548A0F9D3EEE2CDEB2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"
